stories.title: Everything you need to know for Pistons-Cavs Game ...
stories.summary: The Cavaliers and Pistons are headed back to Detroit tied 2-2. We broke down the key factors ahead of Game 5.

stories.title: Trump admin waves visa bonds for World Cup fans
stories.summary: The Trump administration is suspending a requirement that foreign visitors from certain countries pay as much as $15,000 in bonds as long as they are confirmed World Cup ticket holders.

stories.title: NFL nixed minority offensive asst. mandate in '25
stories.summary: The NFL ended a mandate that all 32 teams hire a minority coach as an offensive assistant ahead of the 2025 season and not because of recent pressure from Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier.

stories.title: Vegas' McNabb banned 1 game for hit on Poehling
stories.summary: Golden Knights defenseman Brayden McNabb will serve a one-game suspension in Thursday's Game 6 following an interference infraction that injured Ducks forward Ryan Poehling.

stories.title: NBA lands on '3-2-1 lottery' proposal, per Silver
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver confirmed on Stephen A. Smith's radio show Wednesday that the NBA has landed on a proposal to present to the league's board of governors later this month to revamp the league's draft lottery in an attempt to curb tanking.
